scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.cpSync('build', '../build', {recursive:true});"
scripts.vercel-build: cd frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.cpSync('build', '../build', {recursive:true});"
